title: Gpscript.exe
html:
Gpscript.exe

Used by group policy to process scripts

Execute

Add local group policy logon script to execute file and hide from defensive counter measures

Gpscript /logon

Executes logon scripts configured in Group Policy. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: Administrator

Add local group policy logon script to execute file and hide from defensive counter measures

Gpscript /startup

Executes startup scripts configured in Group Policy — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: Administrator
